response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong match for this Senior Fullstack Developer role, with 15+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. His current position at re:cinq directly mirrors the role — full-stack TypeScript/Node.js work, AI agent infrastructure, and MCP framework development. He demonstrates solid database breadth (MongoDB, SQL), cloud and container proficiency (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and a deeply ingrained testing culture evidenced by public workshops, TDD practice, and open-source testing libraries. Primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience, no mention of Kotlin or Python, and limited visibility into relational database depth beyond generic SQL references.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple product companies, directly matching the primary stack
Current AI agent and MCP framework work at re:cinq maps precisely to the AI agent development requirement
Demonstrated testing culture through TDD practice, public workshops, and open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, which is the required primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skills list despite both being listed as required proficiencies
No clear evidence of Vitest or Playwright usage; testing tool familiarity appears to skew toward older or language-specific frameworks
